titleStmt.title: SII 18.433: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 433. (B.K. No. 155 of 1932-33.) MALLŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1557, Yuva, Phālguṇa śu. 1, Saturday, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1636, February 27, Saturday.

It registers the sale-deed of a land in Malūr (modern Mallūr) executed by Dēvaṇagauḍa, son of Kenchaṇagauḍa of Malūr to Channappagauḍa son of Viraṇṇagauḍa of Hommaraḍi. The pedigree of Channappagauḍa is given. It is stated that Sāṁtaṇṇagauḍa, son of Paḍḍe Saṁgappagauḍa and an ancestor of Channappagauḍa was holding the gauḍike of Hommaraḍi-Kaṁpaṇa when Virūpaksharāya was reigning in Vidyānagara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaAnotherca is written below this letter.ṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarā
raṁbhaṁ mulastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śālivāhanaśaka 1557 ne
yūvasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa śu . 1 sthiravāradalu bārasida sāsānada krama
veṁteṁdaḍe . hommaraḍiya vīraṁṇagauḍara maga caṁnnappagauḍarige malūra keṁca
ṇagauḍara maga dēvaṇagauḍaru taṁna Ausara nimityavāgi malūra sabaḷiga
saripālanu koṭṭu tegaduko Ardha . 150 varaha Ardhapālu kraya sallemūṟa
koṭṭanū . kōḍihaḷḷi taṟiyadahaḷḷi bairāpura siddhanamaṭa vīrāpura saṁkarikoppamu
ḍalu ke(r)re Udakada saru gaḍi . teṁkalu bellada haḷḷa gaḍi . paḍuvalu gaḍikallamoraḍi
siddhana sarugaḍi . baḍagalu bogarihaḷḷada dhumukunīru gaḍi . yiṁtī Ardhapālu Āḷi sukhadalli
yiri . caṁnappagauḍa mruttapra bhadrappa basavappa doḍḍavīrappa Āṟumaṁdige sa
maṁdha . mēlāda dāyādyarige samaṁdhavilla . yiṁtappudake sākṣigaḷu kāginelleya mallaṇa
gauḍa sēnabōva hanumaṁṇa benūra sīme kākōḷada gauḍa ḍapphagauḍa kasabihoṁ
maraḍiya sēnabōva nārāyaṇakumāra taḷavāṟaṁ nāgināyaka baḍige kaṟakaḷapappana maga biṭṭō
janu sākṣigaḷa vappita kartuvina vappita . mūrthavaFor muhūrta.koṭṭa jōyisa hoṁmaraḍiya rā
maṇajōyisa . yīsāsānava baradāta mallura sēnabōva liṁgaṁṇana maga cikka savaṁṇa .
haḷesāsānada mātu hēge yeṁdare pūrvvadalli vi
dyānagaradalli virupākṣarāyaru rājyavanāḷuvaRead vā.ga
paḍḍe saṁgappagauḍara maga sāṁtaṁṇagauḍaru homma
raḍikaṁphaReadvā.ṇada gauḍikeya māḍutiddanu Ātana ma
ga guruvaṁṇagauḍa Ātana maga mallaṇagauḍa Ātana maga
liṁgaṇagauḍa Ātana maga guḷaṇagauḍa Ātana maga basa
vaṇagauḍa Ātana momaga kētaṇagauḍa Ātana ma
ga maṁgaṇagauḍa Ātana tama vīraṇagauḍa Ātana maga
hanumaṇagauḍa Ātana maga vīraṇagauḍa Ātana maga
caṁnappagauḍa samasta svāstiyu mallura Ardhapālu sahita samaṁdha
dēmaṇagauḍana makkaḷige malluru Ardhāpālu samaṁdha mēlādavaru vaṁdu samaṁdha
villa śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 18.433 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
